earlyCareerShort: 2013–2017: junior iOS in product companies and indie App Store apps — first role Dec 2013; full timeline at vil4max.github.io.

education.displayFull: Donetsk State University of Management · Donetsk, Ukraine — Bachelor's degree, Production sector management

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Apple Watch Voice AI — R&D project
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · WatchKit · SwiftUI · WebSockets · WatchConnectivity · AVFoundation
bullets: Built a production watchOS voice AI app — full on-watch flows, not a thin remote UI.
iPhone acts as backend relay (WebSocket not available on Watch): built the Watch ↔ iPhone channel for audio and shared state with the server-side AI agent, including deduplication across devices.
Split features across Watch and iPhone where platform limits required it; shipped internal TestFlight builds within watchOS constraints (background, audio sessions, connectivity).
Built on-device intent handling so commands update navigation and forms without unnecessary round-trips.
bulletsShort: Built a production watchOS voice AI app — full on-watch flows, not a thin remote UI.
iPhone acts as backend relay (WebSocket not available on Watch): built the Watch ↔ iPhone channel for audio and shared state with the server-side AI agent, including deduplication across devices.
Split features across Watch and iPhone where platform limits required it; shipped internal TestFlight builds within watchOS constraints (background, audio sessions, connectivity).

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty · Loyalty squad
bullets: Shipped core marketplace commerce in a production online store — catalog, search, cart, checkout, and orders — across App Store releases.
Technical lead on Premium Subscription — full cycle: feature definition through implementation, TestFlight, debug, and App Store release (cashback/bonus logic).
Migrated Premium from the main app into an independent SDK module with per-host-app configuration inside the shared loyalty platform.

projectsDetail.name: Premium Subscription
projectsDetail.summary: Cashback/bonus tier — extracted into a dedicated SDK module; App Store release

roles.title: iOS Engineer
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · UIKit · SPM · WebSockets · Apple Pay · URLSession
bullets: Owned ordering and drink-customization flows; shipped App Store releases on a three-person iOS team.
Delivered checkout with Apple Pay and loyalty integration in production.
Implemented live order tracking over WebSockets with polling fallback when the connection drops.

roles.title: iOS Developer
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · UIKit · RxSwift · REST · Auto Layout
bullets: Built a gamer ecosystem in production — teams, tournaments, brackets, and player tables across complex UIKit surfaces.
Introduced RxSwift for tournament and table state when reactive patterns were new — managed non-trivial async UI across the product.

roles.title: iOS Developer
roles.project: Electus — crypto market info & wallet MVP
bullets: Lead iOS engineer on a crypto wallet MVP — market info and wallet flows; mentored a junior engineer on implementation.
Stored credentials and wallet state in Keychain; shipped TestFlight builds through MVP release.

roles.title: iOS Developer
roles.project: Eastern Union — Broker Tool & client delivery apps
roles.technologiesLine: Swift · UIKit · REST · Core Bluetooth · Core Location
bullets: Built Eastern Union — production broker tool for traders with calculator-heavy deal flows (cap rates, mortgage, IRR) and substantial business logic.
Kept calculator and quote screens responsive under frequent data updates; shipped App Store releases.
